words.def: a political theory advocating an authoritarian hierarchical government (as opposed to democracy or liberalism)
words.zh: n. 法西斯主義, 極端國家主義
n. 失誤, 避免, 失敗, 小姐

words.def: the property of a body that causes it to have weight in a gravitational field
words.zh: n. 塊, 大多數, 質量, 大量, 群眾, 彌撒

words.def: an anticipated outcome that is intended or that guides your planned actions
words.zh: [計] 互動遷移系統體系結構, 自動自適應庫存管理系統

words.def: a waterproof raincoat made of rubberized fabric
words.zh: n. 防水膠布, (英)雨衣, 老兄, 老弟

words.def: the fleshy part of the human body that you sit on
words.zh: n. 驢, 傻瓜, 笨蛋, 屁股

words.def: an anticipated outcome that is intended or that guides your planned actions
words.zh: n. 目標, 瞄準, 擊中目標的能力
